q1.q: How is this different from a remote PC-bang?
q1.a: Remote PC services let you rent a remote machine, so you're limited by its specs, network, and image compression. We install on YOUR PC and only apply the PC-bang authentication, so your hardware and graphics stay untouched.

q2.a: We use the standard PC-bang authentication flow, and you log in on your own PC. There is no policy violation from the publisher's side.

q3.a: League of Legends, Valorant, Lost Ark, PUBG, FC Online, and most other major Korean PC-bang titles. See the home page for the full list.

q4.a: Full refund within 24 hours if unused. Prorated refund based on remaining days after that.

q5.q: Does it work on Mac or mobile?
q5.a: Windows only for now. macOS support is planned for H2 2026.

q6.q: How do I receive the program after paying?
q6.a: Contact @mypcbang on Telegram and we'll send you the payment details, installer, and license key.

contact.title: Get a fast reply on Telegram
contact.subtitle: Weekdays or weekends — we answer quickly.
